tone_guidelines: Be energetic, opinionated, and culturally fluent. Use humor, references, and relatable commentary. Audience expects hot takes, personality-driven content, and entertainment value above all.
audience_archetype: Pop culture enthusiasts, Gen Z and millennial audiences seeking entertaining commentary, reactions, and cultural analysis

platform_hints.youtube: Reaction videos, ranking/tier lists, deep dive essays, commentary with clips. Personality-driven editing.
platform_hints.tiktok: Reaction duets, hot takes, 'things that live rent free in my head' format. Trending audio usage.
platform_hints.instagram: Memes, ranking carousels, aesthetic mood boards, behind-the-scenes content.
platform_hints.linkedin: Entertainment industry business analysis, creator economy insights.
platform_hints.podcast: Roundtable discussions, episode reviews, celebrity interview reactions.
platform_hints.blog: Longform cultural essays, listicles, retrospective deep dives.
platform_hints.twitter: Live-tweeting events, meme threads, hot take polls.

engagement_rules: Lead with the most controversial or surprising take
Reference current trends and viral moments for timeliness
Invite audience debate — use polls, 'agree or disagree?' prompts
Show genuine personality and emotional reactions
Use visual gags, sound effects, and editing for comedic timing
